title: Unending Void [FIXED]
description: Explore the Void as a new dimension in Minecraft!
body:
![Title](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/yMUxI3YW/images/02ec39476663cfc646a999678751aeb67c331513.png)

## 🔎 Information

---

This mod aims to expand the Void in Minecraft by making it into a fully explorable dimension!

![Void](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yMUxI3YW/images/2531f01c1f354945b3834c61cb856d81f39909c2.png)

## 🌇 Details

---

****Here's how this works****, if you go deep underground you will eventually find two new blocks, Void Dark and Void Gems! 

![Void Dark and Gems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yMUxI3YW/images/83b1e2ecf1f5273dc3ca95a0b61b54fa5a9bc284.png)

These are two blocks you will need to craft the **Terminus**. This block will be able to break Bedrock if you place above it! Once you've done all that, all you have to do is jump into the darkness and you've entered The Void!

![Recipe](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/yMUxI3YW/images/2ff52f325f50a8ae0327b8c3b2729431b26ef366.gif)

![Breaking Bedrock and entering The Void](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/yMUxI3YW/images/c1f5e955da2d161bab1566304072c0baf17142a0.gif)

The void is ***really*** dark, you have the Darkness effect permanently, but you can remove it by making a potion of **Dark Vision** using a **Potion of Night Vision** and a **Void Gem** in a **Brewing Stand!** You can also extend it by combining a **Void Gem** and an extended Potion of **Night Vision**!

![Dark Vision](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/yMUxI3YW/images/c118f8aec02a736263689a22713775bdb78c654e.gif)

In the void, there are lots of structures, but you're mainly going there for the ores. **Iron, Gold, Diamond** and every other ore spawns ***way more frequently** in the void as **little pieces scattered through the place**.

![Mining Diamonds](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/yMUxI3YW/images/0d14d16d6a8fa33a17b339be86e0f54544abdec5.gif)

Getting out of **The Void** is really easy, you can build up to **Y:96** or climb up the **Void Light** blocks and you will be teleported back in the Overworld at **Y:-59**! 

![Climbing Void Light](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/yMUxI3YW/images/8060187e2d41ab123c9167b99f5c73a5e26e6add.gif)
